_note: Copy this file into your project root as reg_manifest.json and fill in the fields.

project.name: YOUR_PROJECT_NAME
project.description: Brief description of what this project does commercially

_domains_note: Remove domains not relevant to this project. Available: privacy_data, ai_automation, insurance_tech, financial_services, employment_tech
_states_note: Add state codes as strings for any state this project operates in. Example: ['OH', 'KY', 'IN']. Leave empty for federal-only scope.
